description: This file is the entry point for a React-based web application. It imports necessary modules, including React, ReactDOM, CSS styles, and the main App component. It initializes the React app by rendering the App component within a root element in the DOM.

methods.name: ReactDOM.createRoot
methods.description: Creates a root to render a React application into the DOM.

methods.name: root.render
methods.description: Renders React elements into the DOM at the specified root.
